title: GasCityDomainCommandTerminal v1
description: Result of a GasCityDomainCommandRequested.v1 command, published by the domain bridge back to the requesting city as a cross-city ENVELOPE event (payload = this object) with payload.route set from the request's reply.route, normally <binding>.command-terminal-reconciler. The receiving adapter creates a routed bead; the domain-handoff domain-command-reconcile order stamps the result onto the waiting domain_command_request bead and its origin bead, then closes the waiter, unblocking downstream molecule steps. This schema validates the PAYLOAD object; the envelope is validated by common-envelope.v1. Contract version 1.1.
